sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n282" key="a)galakti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγᾰλακτία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n282.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of milk,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0423.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Autocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
